name: Chocolate Meringue Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 300°F (150°C).
2. Generously butter an 8-inch springform pan and line the bottom with a circle of buttered wax paper.
3. Melt chocolate and butter together until smooth.
4. Lightly whisk egg yolks, then gradually add the chocolate mixture, stirring until blended.
5. Add sugar and stir once again until smooth.
6. In another bowl, beat egg whites and salt until stiff peaks form.
7. Fold a quarter of the egg whites into the chocolate mixture to lighten it, then fold in the remainder.
8. Turn the batter into the prepared pan and smooth the top slightly.
9. Bake for 1 hour and 30 minutes (or 90 minutes) or until set.
10. Let the cake stand at room temperature until cool.
11. Gently remove the sides of the springform and invert onto a serving plate or paper-lined cookie sheet if freezing.
12. To serve, sprinkle with powdered sugar or frost with jelly and/or whipped cream, or light chocolate glaze. If desired, lightly glaze the bottom before inverting.
13. This freezes well; flash freeze on a cookie sheet uncovered, then wrap securely. When ready to serve, place on a serving plate while still frozen and cover well to prevent condensation from forming on the wrappings instead of the cake.
